name: EchoSpan Flexible 360
description: EchoSpan Flexible 360 is feedback software that streamlines employee reviews and supports workforce development. Learn more about EchoSpan Flexible 360

reviews.review_title: Excellent System with East to use Features and support
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Excellent - easy to use and exceeded expectations
reviews.review_pros: The flexibility of being able to change things like rater groups
reviews.review_cons: There was nothing I did not like. All features were easy to use and support was available when needed

reviews.review_title: Echospan is the best choice for our organization
reviews.review_pros: The customer support is fantastic. Our success representative is helpful, knowledgeable and support. She understands the technical side of the tools, but also has experience in best practices and implementation.
reviews.review_cons: Echospan is a bit more expensive than other tools on the market, but it is worth the extra money.

reviews.review_description: I'm not a heavy user of the actual EchoSpan tool but have leveraged [sensitive content hidden] for her experience highly in the past several weeks. She is super professional and proficient at her job, and a real pleasure to work with! She seeks clarity through her questions and helps brainstorm possible solutions. We think she's a great partner for our organization and team!!
reviews.review_pros: My favorite part of the tool is the ease, speed and self serve nature we recently discovered with the help of [sensitive content hidden] on how we can build new and modify existing surveys.
reviews.review_cons: The most recent "ask" for support was around 3 years of 360 data. We learned that data is pulled project by project which is manual and time consuming. It would be great to have option to pull multiple projects at one time.

reviews.review_pros: The software is fairly easy to use. The service provided is great. They typically respond much sooner than the 24 hours promised. The reports are generated quickly. The ability for development planning (although we haven't used the function yet)
reviews.review_cons: Overall, it is very intuitive . I wish I could delete my own projects out of archive. I wish I could click a button for all the questions and make changes to them versus individual questions (I.e., quickly convert a group of questions from self only to both raters).

reviews.review_title: Improved the given leadership feedback loop with accuracy
reviews.review_pros: The aspect that was most concerning to me regards the amount of flexibility that I had concerning the review process. I managed to set up the rating scales, modify the evaluation forms, and changes in the flow according to our leadership competencies.
reviews.review_cons: One of the weaknesses that need to be addresses is inadequate historical comparison across reports. It was difficult for me to check historical values of variability on several periods of review cycle without compiling data from the previous cycles.

reviews.review_pros: The system has been stable, and [sensitive content hidden]'s swift responses have been a tremendous support.
reviews.review_cons: Some of the functions are not available to system user, and I have to bother [sensitive content hidden]. She has been great. No major co ncerns.

reviews.review_pros: We love the opportunity Echospan provides for our teams to provide honest, authentic, constructive feedback. We love being able to edit the questions to fit the mission and values of our program.
reviews.review_cons: I wish the N/A option on the radio button questions didn't calculate as a zero for the averages

reviews.review_description: Overall, it's a great experience. Easy to access the materials and review documents.
reviews.review_pros: Online training to signup for assistance from a real person, assessment layout, time response in receiving the assessment, graphs, comment section for development opportunities, and more
reviews.review_cons: Demo, trial to do before completing a group project.

reviews.review_title: Easy to Use Platform and Great Support Team
reviews.review_description: EchoSpan Flexible 360 is our go-to platform to launch 360 degree feedback assessment for all of our clients to support our Leadership Development and Coaching programs.
reviews.review_pros: When deciding which 360 platform to use, it is critical for us to chose a partner that has a great support team to help us get set up and if we have additional questions. In addition, echospan provided a platform that is super easy to use for customers and administrators.
reviews.review_cons: There is nothing I don't like about the platform and if there was, I would let echospan know and I am sure they would help us find a solution or consider adding it to their feature development.

reviews.review_title: Echospan has been a very useful product for our company
reviews.review_description: We had a new senior team in place and they all had varying work styles and they tended to disagree a lot. The 360 helped coach focus on the areas they had in common and work backwards from there.
reviews.review_pros: I liked the videos they provide which provide you with the answers to the majority of questions you may have. There on-line assistance was very timely and helpful. . I really liked the way you could run reports in several different format which allowed you to be more focused on the information you were looking for. Adding and deleting raters and was a very easy task.
reviews.review_cons: There were a few things that were not intuitive when you first set up your account however going back to the home page always helped me.

reviews.review_description: I am a fan! EchoSpan has proven to be an ideal partner for our engagement surveys. The staff are highly responsive and the communication on projects is unsurpassed. These characteristics are not easy to find in many bigger technology companies. Bigger is not always better. EchoSpan is the smart choice for solid software functionality and 5 star customer service!
reviews.review_pros: Many software packages are "over built" for the functionality businesses actually need. EchoSpan is one of the few companies who designs software that walks that line perfectly. The basics are covered with an easy step-by-step process that is both intuitive and elegant. There are also advanced features like sentiment analysis to keep pace with market competitors. They've delivered the perfect balance of neither too much nor too little functionality in their software, which makes it particularly ideal for mid-market clients. Additionally, I can't say enough about the professionalism of their project management team. We outsourced a very high profile project to EchoSpan and I never experienced such seamless implementation, flexibility to change course when needed, and detailed communication to ensure decisions happened quickly. Bravo EchoSpan!
reviews.review_cons: Honestly, I can't think of anything. The reports are straightforward and easy to understand. Some of the competitors have elegant data visualization dashboards but charge 2x the money for it.

reviews.review_title: The best option for custom 360's with exceptional customer support
reviews.review_description: The ability to set up a powerful, custom 360 for our clients has been invaluable. The amazing customer support received from [SENSITIVE CONTENT], our account rep, is immeasurable. They have been extremely helpful in helping us set up the instrument and continue to support us as we go through different projects and/or want to customize certain aspects of the tool. Their response time to our questions is fast and we always feel like we are supported as we are still in a learning phase.
reviews.review_pros: The software itself provides valuable, anonymous feedback for our clients to help aid in their leadership growth. It is It was easy to set up and easy to use. We can easily customize projects and the communication for each project.
reviews.review_cons: There is nothing about this software that we have found that we do not like.

reviews.review_description: EchoSpan has been a great partner as I've built out my company's 360 feedback program over the past few years. Their customer service is exceptional and they are great about listening to customers' ideas for enhancements to the product.
reviews.review_pros: The EchoSpan platform is extremely easy to use. I've used other 360 feedback platforms in the past, but EchoSpan's is by far the most flexible and intuitive. EchoSpan has been able to meet my unique needs in 360 setup and administration and they are always adding new features.
reviews.review_cons: The training manuals and videos are at times too high level to answer my specific questions. However, my contacts at EchoSpan are always very responsive to quickly address my questions.

reviews.review_title: A great product backed by a solid team
reviews.review_description: I can't say enough good things about the Echospan 360-degree feedback tool! The platform is flexible, intuitive, and easy-to-use. We have been able to configure a variety of custom assessments aligned to our organization's leadership competency model while leveraging the robust content provided by Echospan. The user interface is simple and attractive, and the feedback from our users (primarily senior-level business leaders) has been overwhelmingly positive. In addition, the service we've received from Echospan has been exceptional. Their leadership team was flexible and patient as we worked through the contracting process. Our dedicated support partner is incredibly responsive and thorough in addressing our questions/requests and offering innovative ideas and solutions. Having used Echospan's 360-degree feedback platform across a variety of industries, in public and private sectors, and with organizations large and small, I would confidently recommend it to anyone looking to implement a robust yet cost effective 360-degree assessment program in their organization.

reviews.review_title: Easy to use and great customer service + customization
reviews.review_description: EchoSpan has been super helpful and friendly from the beginning when we start shopping around for 360 tools. Their tools are easy to use and manage + they include the features we needed (we can customize questions, reports, emails, etc). And the team is quick to get feedback on any questions or issues.
reviews.review_pros: First and foremost, the EchoSpan customer service has been amazing. I never wait more than 2 hours for a response on any questions and they have helped me update, customize, and create multiple different reports for our program. The software is easy to use and navigate. And the reports come out great + they are easy to customize to get what we need.
reviews.review_cons: I wish it was easier to customize without getting help (but then again, it's nice to pass along a request and have it done for us).

reviews.review_title: Experience Deploying a 360 Review to My Staff Team
reviews.review_description: I sought out this tool as a component of my professional development plan, in my executive leadership role. While some of my direct reports opted not to participate, which posed a challenge to my getting a really robust 360 perspective, my interactions with the EchoSpan team and software were top notch.
reviews.review_pros: The software was easy to customize, to get at what I sought to learn from both my peers and my direct reports. The business development person from EchoSpan who I worked with was extremely helpful, responsive and knowledgeable - She made the whole process simple and enjoyable. Her name is [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN]. She is an exceptional representative for your company.
reviews.review_cons: I honestly had no cons. It was an extremely positive experience - primarily due to my engagement with [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN].

reviews.review_description: Echospan is easy to use and navigate. The support team makes it easy for us as a firm to offer 360 solutions to our clients.
reviews.review_pros: The software is intuitive and easy to use. The support team is excellent, responsive, and consultative in providing solutions.
reviews.review_cons: So far, I have no negative feedback on the software.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: We are using the survey as part of our overall talent management activities.
reviews.review_pros: Very intuitive and well designed. Very easy to customize to your exact needs. Very easy to get up and running in a short period of time. There is a very strong support component to their service, replete with training videos and Q&A brochures. We purchased the enterprise option and have found the dedicated support person to be a very helpful feature.
reviews.review_cons: There are a very small number of advanced features in the application that are not readily observable. This has not posed any insurmountable problems, but spending as much time upfront in learning the intricacies of the application will pay huge dividends.

reviews.review_title: I highly recommend the EchoSpan 360 assessment. From set up to reporting, it's user friendly!
reviews.review_pros: Great customer support and ease of use. I also appreciate the reporting options including the individual and overall reports. Very easy to customize.
reviews.review_cons: I really like this software. I can't think of any cons. It's easy to use - even for a first timer - :)

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: We have been using EchoSpan 360-degree feedback tool for the past one month now. It is very easy to use and meets our business requirement 100%. The team behind the scenes provide excellent support with all the queries. They are super responsive and the turnaround is usually less than 12 hours. The reports functionality on the tool gets 5/5. They've got all the reports that you can possibly think of and just a click away! Overall, it's a great tool and I would highly recommend it to anyone who wants to run their own 360 surveys instead of hiring someone to do it for them.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to navigate Great reporting tool

reviews.review_title: Been using this software for 8 years and really like the ease of use and the great customer service!
reviews.review_description: The tool is great and so is the customer service. The only cons would be trying to extract the data for analysis. Also, when there are upgrades, I find it difficult to learn what they are since I am so busy with my workload, but that is not their fault.

reviews.review_title: Top Notch Customizable EchoSpan 360-degree Feedback Tool
reviews.review_description: I have been working with the EchoSpan 360-degree Feedback Tool since 2008 and think it is extremely user-friendly, intuitive, very cost-effective, and easy to use. I have run hundreds of 360 surveys globally with this tool, and have run into minimal issues in 8 years. EchoSpan provides thorough customer service support, and their account team is accommodating and has made our large, organization wide surveys an easy process to implement. Last year I compared EchoSpan to two other tools on the market - I stayed with EchoSpan because of the user interface and cost effectiveness.

Using the EchoSpan 360-degree feedback tool, Customer Support has guided me and, therefore, my organization through the twists and turns of creating a customized instrument, customized email letters, and provides on-going advice as the process rolls out. They are a superb strategic partner.
reviews.review_pros: It's flexibility, clarity, completeness - it seems to have thought of everything we would need to be successful in our 360 project.
reviews.review_cons: Dunno.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Thus far we have had a very good experience, we have had to extend the dates so we are still a few weeks away from the reporting piece.
reviews.review_pros: functionality, specifically the ability to make last minute changes as various points in the project
reviews.review_cons: Emails - ensuring that you had the right buttons turned on to either send separately or as a group. The other item would be the dates that were required in the project phase, was unsure about the dates.

reviews.review_description: EchoSpan 360 Degree Feedback tool is very comprehensive and easy to use. I needed to implement a solution quickly and this tool enabled me to do just that. The support team was always available to help and assist. They have excellent customer service.
